metadata.description: UK-focused real opportunities/events formatted as Side Quest cards for a campus discovery app. Includes hackathons, networking events, insight programmes, internships, careers events, and deadline trackers.

status_legend.open: Source appeared to be accepting registrations/applications or listing tickets at verification time.
status_legend.watchlist: Useful tracker or opportunity family; exact next dates/deadlines should be monitored.
status_legend.registration_closed_watchlist: Closed/past item retained only as a recurring/event-pattern signal for future Side Quest recommendations.

difficulty_scale.easy: Low barrier: networking, webinar, careers fair, or light application.
difficulty_scale.medium: Requires application, technical/product preparation, or larger time commitment.
difficulty_scale.hard: Selective, technically demanding, or requires advanced academic background.

import_notes: Dates/times are stored in ISO 8601 using Europe/London offsets where available.
Null deadline_datetime means no firm deadline was found from the source at verification time.
Side Quest Party plans are generated recommendations, not official organiser instructions.
Some Eventbrite-derived items are marked medium confidence because full page access may be rate-limited; source URLs are included for user confirmation.
Closed/watchlist entries can power alerts for future recurring campus-event cycles and should not be shown as currently joinable unless your app supports watchlist states.

verification.notes: Details may change; users should confirm tickets/applications on the source page before committing.

matching_criteria: complementary frontend, backend, design, and pitching skills

Decide who owns frontend, backend/AI, design, and final pitch.

Schedule a 30-minute demo rehearsal before submission.
